rationale: All events show the machine account 'user-01$' accessing standard network shares (IPC$ and SYSVOL) from its own link-local IPv6 address. Accessing SYSVOL for gpt.ini files (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) and IPC$ for lsarpc (A0, EV-004-EV-007) are normal behaviors for a domain-joined host retrieving Group Policy and performing inter-process communication.
